_doc: Metric catalogue plus an app registry (where each metric lives, with link placeholders) and owner-documented RAG thresholds. 'metrics' is the list the engine iterates; 'apps' and 'rag_thresholds' are lookups for the answer layer.

MAR-Operational.purpose: Operational claims KPIs — new/closed/pending/reopened, ratios, reserves (incl. nominals), incurred, OSLR, age profiles, time-to-settle, static & inactive claims.
MAR-Operational.refresh: PCW updated the following weekend; other sources loaded on the 5th of each month.
MAR-Operational.coverage: 5 years of financial transactions. Counts are distinct claim numbers in a group.
MAR-Operational.note: Each claim is mapped to a business unit (defines Country) and a product (defines Line of Business).
MAR-Operational.view: Monthly view, indicator-based (NEW/CLOSED/REOPENED/PENDING per accounting period).
MAR-Operational.period_basis: Accounting period (all financials/claims are on an accounting-period basis; monthly, indicator-based).

MAR-Conduct.purpose: TCF / conduct reporting — complaints, declinatures, time to acknowledge, time to effect payment (GPI), time to respond to correspondence.
use_for: conduct: TTEP, TTACK, TTC, complaints, declined

Portfolio Insight.purpose: Portfolio & claims trends by country and line of business across EMEA; one-stop for policy data used in staffing models.
Portfolio Insight.coverage: Policies underwritten 2005 onwards; claims for the most recent six years (from 2020).

Claim One Stop.purpose: Latest view of claims across the EMEA region.
Claim One Stop.coverage: Each claim mapped to a Business Unit (Country) and a Product (Line of Business).
Claim One Stop.view: Latest position of every claim and total financial movements as of today.
Claim One Stop.period_basis: Claim reported / opened / closed date (latest position of every claim; financial movements as of today).

Transactional App.purpose: Automated, self-service monthly Transactional Performance reporting (replaces manual reporting).
Transactional App.refresh: Refreshed every Wednesday by end of day; full previous-month refresh on the 10th of each month, end of day.

EMEA Unreserved Report.purpose: SOX control listing open claims that are unregistered (no Genius file) or unreserved (Genius file with zero indemnity reserve and active status). Replaces the old Unregistered Claims and Incomplete Claims controls; operated like the Nominals control with a monthly attestation only.
EMEA Unreserved Report.coverage: Open unregistered/unreserved claims; claims <30 days from reported date or with the reserve-not-required flag are treated as managed (excluded).

reservedinunder5businessdaystonewclaims.label: Reserved in under 5 business days to New Claims

reservedinunder30daystonewclaims.label: Reserved in under 30 days to New Claims

timetoeffectpaymentingpi.label: Time to Effect Payment in GPI

timetorespondtocorrespondence5days.label: Time to Respond to Correspondence (% < 5 days)

metrics.name: % CSP Achieved - Basic Book/Direct Marketing/NAC
metrics.definition: Percentage of claims in the Basic Book / Direct Marketing / NAC books that were handled via the CSP (Claims Service Provider) route. CSP, NAC and the book segments are internal definitions — confirm exact numerator/denominator with the A&H team.

metrics.name: % Fast Track Acieved
metrics.definition: Percentage of claims handled through the fast-track (simplified, low-touch) route in the period = Fast Track Claims / total eligible claims x 100. (Source name misspelled 'Acieved'.)

metrics.name: % Fast Track Target
metrics.definition: The target/benchmark percentage of claims that should be handled via fast track in the period.

metrics.name: % Fast Track Throughput
metrics.definition: Percentage of fast-track claims completed (closed) relative to fast-track claims entering the route in the period.

metrics.name: Acceptance Rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of decided claims that were accepted (not declined or walked away) = accepted claims / total decided claims x 100.

metrics.name: Avarage Paid
metrics.definition: Average amount paid per claim = total paid (indemnity + expense) / number of paid claims. (Source name misspelled 'Avarage'.)

metrics.sheet: Cycle Time and Static Claims Report
metrics.name: Average Cycle Time
metrics.definition: Average elapsed days from claim reported (or opened) to closed, across claims closed in the period.

metrics.name: Claim Office Country
metrics.definition: Country name of claim office

metrics.name: Claims
metrics.definition: Count of claims meeting the selected criteria. Confirm whether this counts DISTINCT ClaimID (see business_rules.md).

metrics.name: Class 3 Check
metrics.definition: An internal conduct-risk check tied to the 'Class 3' classification. Proprietary — confirm definition with the Conduct Risk team.

metrics.name: Closed Claims
metrics.definition: Claims closed in one accounting period.

metrics.name: Closed No Payment
metrics.definition: Count of claims closed without any indemnity payment (closed at nil / no-pay).

metrics.name: CSP Ingested Claims - Basic Book/Direct Marketing/NAC
metrics.definition: Count of claims in the Basic Book / Direct Marketing / NAC books ingested via the CSP route. Proprietary segmentation — confirm with the A&H team.

metrics.name: Declinature Rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of decided (or new) claims that were declined = declined claims / total decided claims x 100.

metrics.name: Declined Claims
metrics.definition: Total number of claims declined

metrics.name: Fast Track Claims
metrics.definition: Count of claims handled via the fast-track route in the period.

metrics.sheet: Cycle Time and Static Claims Report
metrics.name: Median Cycle Time
metrics.definition: Median elapsed days from reported (or opened) to closed across closed claims; less sensitive to outliers than the average.

metrics.definition: Claims opened in one accounting period.

metrics.name: % Acknowledgements Issued Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of claims acknowledged within the SLA standard (commonly 5 working days).

metrics.name: % Claim Reserves Registered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of claims where the reserve was registered within the SLA standard.

metrics.name: % Correspondence Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of correspondence answered within the SLA standard.

metrics.name: % Payments Issued Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of payments processed/issued within the SLA standard.

metrics.name: Average Days To Acknowledge Claims
metrics.definition: Mean working days from claim reported to acknowledged.

metrics.name: Average Days To Answer Comms
metrics.definition: Mean working days to respond to correspondence/queries.

metrics.name: Average Days To Issue Payment
metrics.definition: Mean working days from payment received/approved to payment issued.

metrics.name: Average Days To Register Claim Reserve
metrics.definition: Mean working days from claim open to reserve registered.

metrics.name: Average Days To Answer Communication
metrics.definition: Mean working days to respond to correspondence/queries.

metrics.name: Average Days To Issue Payment'
metrics.definition: Mean working days from payment received/approved to payment issued. (Trailing quote is a source typo.)

metrics.name: % Of Cases Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of telephony cases answered within the SLA target time = answered within SLA / calls offered x 100.

metrics.name: No Of Calls Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Number of calls answered within the SLA target time.

metrics.name: % Of Abandoned Calls
metrics.definition: Abandoned calls / calls offered x 100.

metrics.name: Volume Of Calls Abandoned
metrics.definition: Number of calls abandoned (caller hung up before being answered).

metrics.name: Volume Of Calls Answered
metrics.definition: Number of calls answered.

metrics.name: Volume Of Calls Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Number of calls answered within the SLA target time.

metrics.name: Volume Of Calls Offered
metrics.definition: Total number of inbound calls presented to the queue.

metrics.name: % Against New Cases In The Month
metrics.definition: Generic ratio of the subject count to new cases (claims) opened in the month x 100. Confirm the numerator in context.

metrics.name: Average Claims Cost
metrics.definition: Average total cost per claim = total (indemnity + expense) / number of claims.

metrics.name: Average Days Open - Closed Claims
metrics.definition: Average number of days a closed claim was open (reported/opened to closed).

metrics.name: Complaints In Month
metrics.definition: Number of complaints received in the month.

metrics.name: Declinature Review Fails
metrics.definition: Number of declinature decisions that failed QA review.

metrics.name: Declinature Review 'Passed
metrics.definition: Number of declinature decisions that passed QA review. (Stray quote is a source typo.)

metrics.name: Number Of Cases In Litigation
metrics.definition: Count of claims currently in litigation.

metrics.name: Number Of Fraud Referrals
metrics.definition: Count of claims referred for fraud investigation.

metrics.name: Number Of Identified Recoveries
metrics.definition: Count of claims with an identified recovery opportunity.

metrics.name: Quality Check '- Passed
metrics.definition: Number of claim QA checks passed. (Stray quote is a source typo.)

metrics.name: Quality Check'- Failed
metrics.definition: Number of claim QA checks failed. (Stray quote is a source typo.)

metrics.name: Quality Check- Failed (Month) %
metrics.definition: Percentage of claim QA checks failed in the month = failed / total checked x 100.

metrics.name: Quality Check'- Passed (Month) %
metrics.definition: Percentage of claim QA checks passed in the month = passed / total checked x 100. (Stray quote is a source typo.)

metrics.name: SLA Declinatures In Reporting Period
metrics.definition: Number of declinatures issued within SLA in the reporting period.

metrics.name: Telephony - % Of Cases Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Percentage of telephony cases answered within SLA = answered within SLA / offered x 100.

metrics.name: Telephony - Abandoned Ratio
metrics.definition: Abandoned calls / calls offered x 100.

metrics.name: Telephony - No Of Calls Answered Within SLA
metrics.definition: Number of calls answered within the SLA target time.

metrics.name: Telephony - No. Of Abandoned Calls
metrics.definition: Number of calls abandoned before being answered.

metrics.name: Total Paid - Indemnity & Expenses
metrics.definition: Sum of indemnity paid plus expense paid in the period.

metrics.name: Total Upheld
metrics.definition: Number of complaints upheld (decided in the complainant's favour).

metrics.name: TPA Handling Fee
metrics.definition: Fee paid to the TPA for handling claims in the period.

metrics.name: Volume Of New Claims>5 Days
metrics.definition: Number of new claims not acknowledged/actioned within 5 days.

metrics.name: Count
metrics.definition: Generic count of records meeting the selected criteria.

metrics.name: New Cases
metrics.definition: New Assistance Cases Received

metrics.name: Total Opened Cases
metrics.definition: Opened Cases in a Period

metrics.name: Total Operationally Closed
metrics.definition: Total Operationally Closed

metrics.name: Declined Cases
metrics.definition: Cases Declined

metrics.name: Declined to New Cases
metrics.definition: Declined Cases against New Cases Received

metrics.name: Total Invoice Value
metrics.definition: Total Invoice Value paid in €

metrics.name: Average Case Cost
metrics.definition: Total Invoice Value paid over Total Operationally Closed Cases

metrics.name: Calls Offered
metrics.definition: Total Calls Offered

metrics.name: Calls Answered
metrics.definition: Total Calls Answered

metrics.name: Calls Abandoned
metrics.definition: Total Calls Offered minus Total Calls Answered

metrics.name: Calls Abandoned Rate %
metrics.definition: Number of abandoned over the Total Calls Offered

metrics.name: Calls Answered Rate %
metrics.definition: Total Calls Answered over Total Calls Offered

metrics.name: Average Abandonment Time
metrics.definition: Average Time to Abandon in HH MM SS

metrics.name: Average Speed of Answer
metrics.definition: Average Speed of Answer in HH MM SS

metrics.name: Number of Checked Cases
metrics.definition: Number of checked cases

metrics.name: Quality Checked %
metrics.definition: Number of checked cases over New Assistance Cases Received

metrics.name: Outcome-Passed
metrics.definition: Outcome minus Passed

metrics.name: USA Net Savings Current'
metrics.definition: Net Savings Value for USA for reporting Month

metrics.name: EUR Net Savings Current'
metrics.definition: Net Savings Value for EUR for reporting Month

metrics.name: ROW Net Savings Current'
metrics.definition: Net Savings Value for ROW for reporting Month

metrics.name: Total Net Savings Current'
metrics.definition: Total Net Savings Value for reporting Month

metrics.name: Total USA Net Savings
metrics.definition: Total Net Savings Value for USA

metrics.name: Total EUR Net Savings
metrics.definition: Total Net Savings Value for EUR

metrics.name: Total ROW Net Savings
metrics.definition: Total Net Savings Value for ROW

metrics.name: Total Net Savings
metrics.definition: Total Net Savings

entity_map._doc: Row-level Company vs CGM derivation for MAR-Operational, MAR-Conduct and Claim One Stop exports. Use Business Entity if present (most explicit), else Entity. Unknown values -> ask, never guess.
